data.narrative:
OneBrief, a Series B defense and security company founded by Remi Cossart, has raised $47M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer universe of 10 comparables—2 public firms (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private companies in the same sector and stage, including Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, Harmattan AI, Castelion, and Defense Unicorns.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using total capital raised as a proxy for current value and applying a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B advancement, implies a valuation of $89M. Peer-median analysis across six same-sector, same-stage comparables yields a median valuation of $1.2B, with a range spanning $1.0B (floor) to $1.5B (ceiling). The peer cohort reflects recent funding activity and comparable scale within frontier defense technology.

The triangulated valuation range spans $76M (low) to $1.4B (high), with a median of $645M across the two methods. The wide spread reflects material uncertainty about OneBrief's relative market position and growth trajectory versus established peer valuations. Key variables driving the outcome include revenue run-rate relative to peers, customer concentration in government contracts, and technology differentiation within the defense sector. Additional diligence on revenue, margins, and customer retention would narrow this range considerably.
